ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat */,
  "habitat_description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of the habitat (e.g., aquatic, terrestrial, mixed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the collection method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of the collection method (e.g., active, passive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "taxon" TEXT /* Taxon of the species */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the species (e.g., adult, larva) */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the species (e.g., aquatic, terrestrial) */,
  "higher_classification" TEXT /* Higher classification of the species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "species_description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the data was collected */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the habitat where the data was collected */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection method used */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "replicate" INTEGER /* Replicate number of the data point */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species collected */,
  "abundance" INTEGER /* Abundance of the species */,
  "biomass" REAL /* Biomass of the species */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_habitat_id FOREIGN KEY ("habitat_id") REFERENCES habitats ("habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "member_role" TEXT /* Role of the member in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)
